title: oreocarya humilis
intro: Oreocarya humilis, also known as Humilis, is a low-growing perennial plant native to the Andes mountains of South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Oreocarya humilis include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antifungal properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, or applied topically as a poultice or cream, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
